name: Zesty Chili Sirloin Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the minced garlic, chili powder, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1/2 teaspoon pepper.
2. Press the mixture evenly onto both sides of the beef steak.
3. Heat a large nonstick skillet over medium heat until it becomes hot.
4. Place the steak in the skillet and cook for 10 to 13 minutes, turning once, until it reaches your desired level of doneness (medium rare to medium).
5. Trim any excess fat from the steak.
6. Using a sharp knife, carve the steak against the grain into thin slices.
7. Serve the steak with salsa on top.
MAKES 4 SERVINGS
